overview: An animated single-page website for SMS spam detection. Features a 3D particle hero, interactive demo where users paste an SMS and get instant spam/ham classification with confidence scores, an animated pipeline diagram explaining how detection works, stats counters, and a dark cybersecurity-themed design with neon green and blue accents.
features: 3D particle hero section with cursor-reactive animation
Interactive SMS classifier with real-time spam/ham results and confidence score
Animated pipeline diagram showing detection steps
Dark cybersecurity theme with neon green and blue accents
Motoko backend with keyword-heuristic spam classification
